arts.ttl: European football: Bayern beat Leipzig 5-1 as Reijnders delivers Christmas win
arts.sum: Kane returns from injury in Bundesliga thrashing Milan beat Verona 1-0; Girona sink Real Valladolid Bayern Munich stamped their authority on the Bundesliga by hammering fourth-placed RB Leipzig 5-1 in a game that featured two goals in the opening two minutes for the first time in the league’s history. Having lost their first league match of the season to Mainz last week, Bayern delivered a commanding performance against a Leipzig side who struggled to build any attacking momentum. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Bayern DOMINATE with five-goal victory over RB Leipzig!
arts.sum: Highlights of the Bundesliga match between Bayern Munich and RB Leipzig.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich stay top after routing title rivals RB Leipzig
arts.sum: Joshua Kimmich then added a third with a spectacular long-range effort in the 36th minute, assisted by Musiala, putting the record champions in complete control before half-time. Jamal Musiala opened the scoring for Bayern after just one minute, capitalising on a swift attack.

arts.ttl: Harry Kane returns from injury as Bayern Munich thrash RB Leipzig
arts.sum: Jamal Musiala scored after 27 seconds in a 5-1 victory at the Allianz Arena.

arts.ttl: Bundesliga sees quickfire scoring record as Bayern puts five past dismal Leipzig
arts.sum: Two teams had never scored in the opening two minutes of a Bundesliga match until Jamal Musiala gave Bayern the lead after 28 seconds and Benjamin Šeško equalized barely 60 seconds later. Bayern Munich crushed Leipzig 5-1 and they broke a long-standing Bundesliga record for quickfire goals on Friday.

arts.ttl: PLAYER RATINGS | Bayern Munich 5-1 RB Leipzig
arts.sum: The best way to bounce back after their 2-1 loss to Mainz last weekend was Bayern Munich steamrolled RB Leipzig 5-1 to end, a poor year for Bayern trophy-wise, positively. …

arts.ttl: Bayern round off 2024 in style with clear win over Leipzig
arts.sum: Bayern Munich ended the year with a comfortable 5-1 win over RB Leipzig at the Allianz Arena.

arts.ttl: Herbert Hainer on Bayern Munich’s big game blues
arts.sum: Bayern Munich president Herbert Hainer dismissed critics of Bayern’s big game performance this season. At this point, though, Hainer may have negative results in not big games to worry about too.

arts.ttl: Confirmed lineups: Bayern Munich vs. RB Leipzig
arts.sum: The line-ups for Friday's eagerly-awaited Bundesliga clash between Bayern Munich and RB Leipzig have been announced. Harry Kane returns from injury for Bayern.

arts.ttl: Transfer rumors, news: Leipzig's Šeško linked to Chelsea
arts.sum: The French giants are looking to sign a right-footed centre-back, as a long-term replacement for the 31-year-old Marquinhos, and the Ukraine international has impressed in the Premier League . - Newcastle United will make a renewed attempt to sign Burnley goalkeeper James Trafford next year, reports the Daily Mail .
